name: uiux
description: UI/UX craft skills for React prototype reference app work, accessible frontend design, semantic design tokens, reusable components, visual validation, design direction, and brand-voice web copy.

interface.shortDescription: Design, validate, and refine accessible frontend interfaces.
interface.longDescription: A focused set of UI/UX skills for React prototype reference app work, frontend interface design, semantic token discipline, reusable component architecture, visual validation, collaborative design direction, and brand-voice web copy.
defaultPrompt: Update a prototype reference app flow.
Audit this UI for reusable components.
